reviews.review_title: Fun game but needs better control
reviews.review_description: This game is a great way to kill time but if using Gear VR controller, then it kinda sucks. Not sure why you wouldn't use gyroscopic feature for turning instead of going forward and turning with 1 button. It takes some getting used to. Practically every game for Vr uses the gyroscope for right, left turns. That's why I am only giving 3 stars .Update the controls and I will Change rating to 5 stars.

Really nice arcade game. The game is on a rail, so gameplay is you weaving between traffic, getting points for driving in oncoming or chaining combos by nearly side-swiping other cars. Intuitive control using the touchpad on Oculus Go. It's great that all motorcycles and maps can be unlocked using points you earn in-game. And you earn points fairly easily. Great game for those new to VR, and maintaining your 1st person point of view while you wipeout is really fun! Great game for a nice price.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback. Enjoy the game.
